name: Sauteed Fennel and Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil over medium-high heat in a large skillet.
2. Add the fennel and zucchini, cooking and stirring constantly until the vegetables are cooked through but still crisp-tender, about 7 to 8 minutes.
3. Stir in the vinegar and oregano, then season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. This dish can be made ahead of time and reheated at this point.
5. Add the pine nuts and cook over medium heat for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Serve hot. Yield: 4 to 6 servings
